purpose: Improve AIRDOX agents through curated knowledge, NotebookLM research, agentic memory rules, RAG architecture, training scenarios and evaluation rubrics.

tasks.title: Define agent knowledge taxonomy
tasks.acceptance: Semantic, episodic, procedural, evaluative and governance knowledge types are defined and mapped to each AIRDOX agent.
tasks.benefit: Stops knowledge from becoming generic notes and makes it actionable per agent.

tasks.title: Build role-based source map
tasks.acceptance: Each core agent has at least five primary or high-quality sources with purpose, freshness date, risk and usage rule.
tasks.benefit: Improves source quality and reduces outdated assumptions.

tasks.title: Create Agentenschule curriculum
tasks.acceptance: Every core agent has L1-L4 learning goals plus one basic task, one failure task and one cross-agent scenario.
tasks.benefit: Turns education into repeatable training instead of passive documentation.

tasks.title: Define memory governance rules
tasks.acceptance: Rules cover what may enter memory, what must be excluded, provenance, deletion, privacy and approval gates.
tasks.benefit: Allows real knowledge improvement without unsafe or unverified memory growth.

tasks.title: Design AIRDOX RAG and knowledge-base blueprint
tasks.acceptance: Blueprint names source folders, NotebookLM sources, wiki role, retrieval boundaries, update cadence and review gates.
tasks.benefit: Creates a practical architecture for shared agent knowledge.

tasks.title: Create agent knowledge evaluation rubric
tasks.acceptance: Rubric evaluates knowledge use, citation grounding, tool choice, policy adherence, handoff quality and error learning.

tasks.title: Create postmortem and lessons-learned bank
tasks.acceptance: Recurring issues from Decision Log and latest reports are converted into owner, failure class, follow-up check and status.
tasks.benefit: Converts mistakes into durable learning material.

tasks.title: Translate NotebookLM research into project rules
tasks.acceptance: NotebookLM findings produce at least one updated runbook, gate, training task or decision-log entry.
tasks.benefit: Prevents research from ending as unused summaries.

tasks.title: Build knowledge improvement scorecard
tasks.acceptance: Each agent shows source freshness, knowledge depth, open learning gaps, next training item and weakest dimension.

tasks.title: Create monthly cross-agent training simulations
tasks.acceptance: At least five scenarios cover funnel measurement, live-publish approval, desktop UI, risky refactor and stale source handling.
tasks.benefit: Improves decision quality in complex handoffs.
